series_metadata.series_description: Various news releases submitted for media purposes.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain for 1 year. Review for possible Agency historic value. If no historical value is determined by the Ohio Turnpike Commission''s Public Affairs Manager, then destroy. If there is historical value, transfer to storage and the Ohio Turnpike Commission’s Public Affairs Manager will review every 5 years. State Archives will review the records before they are destroyed. ; Electronic: Retain for 1 year. Review for possible Agency historic value. If no historical value is determined by the Ohio Turnpike Commission''s Public Affairs Manager, then destroy. If there is historical value, transfer to storage and the Ohio Turnpike Commission’s Public Affairs Manager will review every 5 years. State Archives will review the records before they are destroyed., Paper: Recycle ; Electronic: Delete
